code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut max_val = 0
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0

  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if num > 0
      if not found
        max_val = num
        found = true
      else if num > max_val
        max_val = num
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if found
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end

  Ok(())
end
